audit_items.proof_trace: There are exactly two kzalloc calls in main.c (line 79 in nfp_bpf_vnic_alloc, line 461 in nfp_bpf_init). Both are freed on all reachable paths: nfp_bpf_vnic_alloc has an err_free_priv goto that kfrees nn->app_priv on the only error path, and the normal teardown goes through nfp_bpf_vnic_free->kfree(bv); nfp_bpf_init uses a cascading goto chain (err_free_neutral_maps -> err_clean_ccm -> err_free_bpf) that kfrees bpf on every error path, and nfp_bpf_clean kfrees bpf on the normal teardown path. The nfp_cpp_area resource in nfp_bpf_parse_capabilities is released via nfp_cpp_area_release_free on both success and all error paths.
